data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_TinyIslandCommunity: DEWFORD TOWN is a tiny island community.\nIf something gets trendy here,\leveryone picks up on it right away.
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_TownSign: DEWFORD TOWN\n“A tiny island in the blue sea.”
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_GymSign: DEWFORD TOWN POKéMON GYM\nLEADER: BRAWLY\l“A big wave in fighting!”
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.Route104_Text_LandedInDewfordDeliverLett: MR. BRINEY: Ahoy!\nWe've hit land in DEWFORD.\pI suppose you're off to deliver that\nLETTER to, who was it now, STEVEN!
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_SetSailBackToPetalburg: MR. BRINEY: Have you delivered your\nLETTER?\pOr were you meaning to sail back to\nPETALBURG?
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_PetalburgWereSettingSai: MR. BRINEY: PETALBURG it is, then!\pAnchors aweigh!\nPEEKO, we're setting sail, my darling!
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_GoDeliverIllBeWaiting: MR. BRINEY: Then you go on and deliver\nthe LETTER. I'll be waiting.
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.Route109_Text_BrineyLandedInDewford: MR. BRINEY: Ahoy!\nWe've hit land in DEWFORD!\pYou just go on and tell me whenever\nyou want to set sail again!
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_WhereAreWeBound: MR. BRINEY: Ahoy!\nFor you, I'll go out to sea anytime!\pNow, my friend, where are we bound?
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_PetalburgWereSettingSai: MR. BRINEY: PETALBURG, is it?\pAnchors aweigh!\nPEEKO, we're setting sail, my darling!
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_SlateportWereSettingSai: MR. BRINEY: SLATEPORT, is it?\pAnchors aweigh!\nPEEKO, we're setting sail, my darling!
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_JustTellMeWhenYouNeedTo: MR. BRINEY: Just tell me whenever you\nwant to set sail again.
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_GettingItchToFish: This is a renowned fishing spot.\nAre you getting the itch to fish?
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_GiveYouOneOfMyRods: I hear you, and I like what\nyou're saying!\pI'll give you one of my fishing RODS.
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_ThrowInFishingAdvice:
And, as an added bonus, I'll even throw
in a little fishing advice!\pFirst, you want to face the water,
then use the ROD.\pFocus your mind...
If you get a bite, pull on the ROD.\pSometimes you can snag something
immediately, but with bigger catches,\lyou need to time the pulls on your ROD\lto haul them in.
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_ThatsTooBadThen: Oh, is that so?\nThat's too bad, then.
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_GreatHaulInSomeBigOnes: Is that right! That's great!\nHaul in some big ones!
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_FishingAdvice:
Oh, hey, don't get down on yourself!
I'll give you a little fishing advice.\pFirst, you want to face the water,
then use the ROD.\pFocus your mind...
If you get a bite, pull the ROD.\pSometimes you can snag something
immediately, but with bigger catches,\lyou need to time the pulls on your ROD\lto haul them in.
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_XIsTheBiggestHappeningT:
I like what's hip, happening, and trendy.
I'm always checking it out.\pListen, have you heard about this new
“{STR_VAR_1}”?\pThat's right!
Of course you know!\pI mean, sheesh,
“{STR_VAR_1}”...\lIt's the hottest thing in cool!\pWherever you're from,
“{STR_VAR_1}”\lis the biggest happening thing, right?
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_TellMeWhatsNewAndIn: Hunh?\nIt's not the hip and happening thing?\pWell, hey, you have to tell me,\nwhat's new and what's “in”?
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_OfCourseIKnowAboutThat:
Hunh?
“{STR_VAR_2}”?\p... ...\p...Uh... Yeah! That's right!
Yeah, I knew that! Knew it all along!\pOf course I know about that!
“{STR_VAR_2},” right?\pYeah, that's it, it's there!
Isn't “{STR_VAR_2}”\lthe coolest, or what?\pIt's the hippest thing in hip.
You think I'd not know about it?\p“{STR_VAR_1}”...
It's, like, so five minutes ago.\pNow, “{STR_VAR_2}” is
what's vital and in tune with the times!
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_XHuhIThinkYIsCool: Hmm...\n“{STR_VAR_2},” huh?\pBut personally, I think\n“{STR_VAR_1}”\lis what's real in cool.
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_HearOfAnyTrendsComeShar: Well, if you hear of any happening new\ntrends, come share them with me, okay?
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_YeahDefinitionOfInRight: Yeah, absolutely right!\p“{STR_VAR_1}” is the\ndefinition of “in” right now.
data/maps/DewfordTown/text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_PinnacleOfCool: “{STR_VAR_2}” is at\nthe pinnacle of cool right now.
